data: {"generalSituation":"An anticyclone aloft will bring mainly fine weather to the coast of southern China today and tomorrow. The weather will be hot during the day over the region. Under the influence of a trough of low pressure and upper-air disturbances, there will be heavy showers and squally thunderstorms over Guangdong in the latter part of this week. The trough of low pressure is expected to depart from the coastal areas over the weekend. Meanwhile, under the influence of an easterly airstream, there will still be showers over Guangdong. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Hagupit will linger over the seas east of the Philippines in the next couple of days.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260512","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"South force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Hot with sunny periods.
